theory_page_past_continuous_questions.name: Past Continuous: Questions and Short Answers

a1.verb_hint: Put was before I/he/she/it in Past Continuous questions.
Put were before plural subjects.
A yes/no question begins with Was or Were.
Use Were + subject + verb-ing.
Use question word + was/were + subject + verb-ing.
Use What were + plural subject + doing.
Where questions keep was/were before the subject.
Use Where were + subject + going.
Short answers repeat was/were.
Negative short answers use wasn't / weren't.
Do not add did to Past Continuous questions.
Do not leave was/were after the subject in questions.
